fetch_send_mode: Agent requests generation; runtime signs upstream calls with stored creds.
recommended_hardening: Issue dedicated keys per integration, set spend/rate limits, rotate keys regularly.
risk_profile: Level=medium-high; Scope=Service/account API scope; Rotation=Medium; BlastRadius=Medium-High; Hardening=Issue dedicated keys per integration, set spend/rate limits, rotate keys regularly.

who_collects_credentials: Plugin setup flow via OpenClaw CLI/config
how_openclaw_exposes_to_agent: Plugin registers tools/channels/hooks; agent uses those abstractions.
agent_to_integration_flow: Agent invokes plugin-registered tools/hooks; plugin executes actions with runtime-configured creds.
fetch_send_mode: Yes when plugin defines outbound actions/connectors.
secret_scope: Depends on plugin permissions and configured creds
recommended_hardening: Pin versions, verify provenance, review permissions/code, run with least privilege.
risk_profile: Level=medium-high; Scope=Depends on plugin permissions and configured creds; Rotation=Medium; BlastRadius=Medium-High; Hardening=Pin versions, verify provenance, review permissions/code, run with least privilege.

how_openclaw_exposes_to_agent: Vault token vending (Model A) or brokered proxy (Model B); agent uses POST /v1/vault/execute.
agent_to_integration_flow: Agent calls vault execute; vault resolves user's OAuth token and calls Gmail API on agent's behalf.
fetch_send_mode: Model A: agent receives short-lived access token. Model B: vault proxies the API call.
recommended_hardening: Minimize OAuth scopes per action template, enforce policy engine rules, audit all vault access, require step-up approval for sends.
risk_profile: Level=high; Scope=User delegated OAuth scopes; Rotation=Low (automatic refresh); BlastRadius=High; Hardening=Minimize scopes, policy engine, audit logging, step-up approval for writes.

how_openclaw_exposes_to_agent: Vault token vending (Model A) or brokered proxy (Model B); agent uses POST /v1/vault/execute.
agent_to_integration_flow: Agent calls vault execute; vault resolves user's OAuth token and calls Drive API on agent's behalf.
fetch_send_mode: Model A: agent receives short-lived access token. Model B: vault proxies the API call.
recommended_hardening: Minimize OAuth scopes per action template (drive.file preferred over drive), enforce policy engine rules, audit all vault access, require step-up approval for file mutations.
risk_profile: Level=high; Scope=User delegated OAuth scopes; Rotation=Low (automatic refresh); BlastRadius=High; Hardening=Minimize scopes (drive.file not drive), policy engine, audit logging, step-up approval.

how_openclaw_exposes_to_agent: Vault token vending (Model A) or brokered proxy (Model B); agent uses POST /v1/vault/execute.
agent_to_integration_flow: Agent calls vault execute; vault resolves user's OAuth token and calls Graph API /me/messages on agent's behalf.
fetch_send_mode: Model A: agent receives short-lived access token. Model B: vault proxies the API call.
secret_scope: User delegated Graph API scopes (Mail.Read / Mail.Send)
recommended_hardening: Minimize Graph API scopes per action template, enforce policy engine rules, audit all vault access, require step-up approval for sends.
